Popular source-backed confidence pass W 2026-06-02: Municipality of Folegandros directly supports Chochlidia as the Karavostasis port pebble beach with easy access by local bus, motorbike, car and boat, plus nearby hotels, taverns, cafes, restaurants and mini markets. Folegandros.com and e-Kyklades support the pebble/mixed shore context and shade/service context. Promoted to high for static metadata only; parking was removed because reviewed sources support car access but not parking, and shallow-water metadata was neutralized to medium because sources only partially support a shallow section. Source wind-suitability/shelter wording was not imported into windProfile, scoring, or live calm/protected/safe claims.

accessNotes.en: To Pountaki vrisketai anamesa ston Karavostasi kai to Livadi kai i teliki prosvasi ginetai apo apotomo monopati dipla ston kentriko dromo. Paroches fagitou i nerou yparchoun ston Karavostasi.
accessNotes.gr: Το Πουντάκι βρίσκεται ανάμεσα στον Καραβοστάση και το Λιβάδι και η τελική πρόσβαση γίνεται από απότομο μονοπάτι δίπλα στον κεντρικό δρόμο. Παροχές φαγητού ή νερού υπάρχουν στον Καραβοστάση.

access.label: Απότομο μονοπάτι
access.notes: Το Πουντάκι βρίσκεται ανάμεσα στον Καραβοστάση και το Λιβάδι και η τελική πρόσβαση γίνεται από απότομο μονοπάτι δίπλα στον κεντρικό δρόμο. Παροχές φαγητού ή νερού υπάρχουν στον Καραβοστάση.

waterDepth.notes: Δεν υπάρχει source-backed ένδειξη για ρηχά ή βαθιά νερά στις άμεσες πηγές. Δεν αποτελεί live safety claim.

sourceNotes: Folegandros final low/no-source batch 2026-05-27: Municipality of Folegandros source-backs Pountaki between Karavostasi and Livadi, with access by a steep path beside the main road and food/water in Karavostasi. Kept beach amenities empty and used difficult-path wording because the direct source says steep path.

Popular source-backed confidence pass W 2026-06-02: Municipality of Folegandros directly supports Pountaki between Karavostasi and Livadi with access by steep path beside the main road, motorbike/boat access, and food/water only in Karavostasis. Folegandros.com and SanMed support sandy unorganized beach context without cafes/tavernas/umbrellas. Promoted to high for static metadata only; terrain was corrected to sand and unsupported deep-water metadata was neutralized to medium. Source wind-suitability wording was not imported into windProfile, scoring, or live calm/protected/safe claims.

orientation.notes: Generated from Natural Earth geospatial exposure facingDeg. This records shoreline-facing direction only; it does not verify shelter, low-wave behavior, or live sea conditions.

sourceNotes: Folegandros final low/no-source batch 2026-05-27: Municipality of Folegandros source-backs Fira as a quiet sandy beach reached by foot or boat, about 15 minutes walking south from Agali, with no food/water access. Kept amenities empty and unorganized.

Popular source-backed confidence pass V 2026-06-02: Municipality of Folegandros supports Fira as a quiet sandy beach about 15 minutes on foot south from Agali, also reachable by boat, with no food/water access. e-Kyklades supports nearby small sandy-cove context. Promoted to high for static metadata only; removed unsupported pebble terrain and set water depth to medium because reviewed sources do not document a shallow/deep claim. Source wind-suitability wording was not imported into windProfile, scoring, or live calm/protected/safe claims.

orientation.notes: Generated from Natural Earth geospatial exposure facingDeg. This records shoreline-facing direction only; it does not verify shelter, low-wave behavior, or live sea conditions.
